1#pragma once
2
3#include "build.hpp"

5#include <cstdint>
6
7#include <format>
8#include <iostream>
9#include <string_view>
10#include <type_traits>
11
12namespace world::meta {
13// Representation of a type.
14struct type_id_t {
15 const uint64_t hash;
16 const bool is_const;
17 const size_t size;
18
19 DEBUG(std::string_view type_name;)
20
21 constexpr bool operator==(const type_id_t &o) const noexcept {
22 return hash == o.hash;
23 }
24 constexpr bool operator<(const type_id_t &o) const noexcept {
25 return hash < o.hash;
26 }
27 constexpr bool operator>(const type_id_t &o) const noexcept {
28 return hash > o.hash;
29 }
30};
31
32// Pointer hash for constexpr ordering.
33constexpr uint64_t ct_hash(const char *s) {
34 uint64_t h = 1469598103834665603ull;
35 while (*s) {
36 h ^= uint64_t(*s++);
37 h *= 1099511628211ull;
38 }
39 return h;
40}
41
42inline size_t increment_dense_type_counter() {
43 static size_t counter = 0;
44 return counter++;
45}
46
47template <typename T>
48size_t type_index() {
49 static const size_t index = increment_dense_type_counter();
50 return index;
51}
52
53#ifdef NDEBUG
54// Type id generator (GNU/Linux)
55template <typename T> inline constexpr static type_id_t type_id() {
56 return type_id_t{ct_hash(__PRETTY_FUNCTION__), std::is_const_v<T>, sizeof(T)};
57}
58#endif
59} // namespace world::meta
60
61#ifndef NDEBUG
62
63template <> struct std::formatter<world::meta::type_id_t, char> {
64 constexpr auto parse(std::format_parse_context &ctx) { return ctx.begin(); }
65
66 template <typename FormatContext>
67 auto format(world::meta::type_id_t t, FormatContext &ctx) const {
68 return std::format_to(ctx.out(), "{}{}{}",
69 t.is_const ? util::ansi::yellow : util::ansi::blue,
70 t.type_name, util::ansi::reset);
71 }
72};
73
74namespace world::meta {
75template <typename T> constexpr std::string_view type_name_sv() {
76#if defined(__clang__) || defined(__GNUC__)
77 constexpr std::string_view fn = __PRETTY_FUNCTION__;
78 constexpr std::string_view key = "T = ";
79
80 const auto start = fn.find(key) + key.size();
81 const auto end = fn.find(';', start); // <-- critical fix
82
83 return fn.substr(start, end - start);
84
85#elif defined(_MSC_VER)
86 constexpr std::string_view fn = __FUNCSIG__;
87 constexpr std::string_view prefix = "type_name_sv<";
88 constexpr std::string_view suffix = ">(void)";
89
90 const auto start = fn.find(prefix) + prefix.size();
91 const auto end = fn.rfind(suffix);
92
93 return fn.substr(start, end - start);
94#endif
95}
96
97// Type id generator (GNU/Linux)
98template <typename T> inline constexpr static type_id_t type_id() {
99 return type_id_t{ct_hash(__PRETTY_FUNCTION__), std::is_const_v<T>, sizeof(T),
100 type_name_sv<T>()};
101}
102} // namespace world::meta
103#endif
